ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The future of .NET UI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BornToBeRoot/NETworkManager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BornToBeRoot/NETworkManager
Language: c%23
A powerful open-source tool for managing networks and troubleshooting network problems!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cysharp/UniTask
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cysharp/UniTask
Language: c%23
Provides an efficient allocation free async/await integration for Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HotCakeX/Harden-Windows-Security
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HotCakeX/Harden-Windows-Security
Language: c%23
Harden Windows Safely, Securely using Official Supported Microsoft methods and proper explanation | Always up-to-date and works with the latest build of Windows | Provides tools and Guides for Personal, Enterprise, Government and Military security levels | SLSA Level 3 Compliant for Secure Development and Build Process | Apps Available on MS Store✨

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MessagePack-CSharp/MessagePack-CSharp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MessagePack-CSharp/MessagePack-CSharp
Language: c%23
Extremely Fast MessagePack Serializer for C#(.NET, .NET Core, Unity, Xamarin). / msgpack.org[C#]

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PCL-Community/PCL-CE
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PCL-Community/PCL-CE
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SakiRinn/LiveCaptions-Translator
Language: c%23
Lightweight and powerful real-time audio/speech translation tool based on Windows LiveCaptions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SirDiabo/GithubLauncher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SirDiabo/GithubLauncher
Language: c%23
A Launcher that Downloads and Updates Applications from Github Releases

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tyrrrz/YoutubeDownloader
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bitwarden/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bitwarden/server
Language: c%23
Bitwarden infrastructure/backend (API, database, Docker, etc).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: d2phap/ImageGlass
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/d2phap/ImageGlass
Language: c%23
🏞 A fast, open-source, modern image viewer for 90+ formats – including WEBP, GIF, SVG, AVIF, JXL, HEIC and more – built for smooth browsing across Windows, macOS, and Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/skills
Language: c%23
Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

ns0:entry.ns0:title: huiyadanli/RevokeMsgPatcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/huiyadanli/RevokeMsgPatcher
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: memstechtips/Winhance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/memstechtips/Winhance
Language: c%23
Application designed to optimize, customize and enhance your Windows experience.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/UIEffect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/UIEffect
Language: c%23
UIEffect is an open-source package that allows you to intuitively apply rich UI effects directly from the Inspector or via code. Combine various filters, such as grayscale, blur, and dissolve, to decorate your UI with a unique visual style!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: space-wizards/space-station-14
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/space-wizards/space-station-14
Language: c%23
A multiplayer game about paranoia and chaos on a space station. Remake of the cult-classic Space Station 13.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tModLoader/tModLoader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tModLoader/tModLoader
Language: c%23
A mod to make and play Terraria mods. Supports Terraria 1.4 (and earlier) installations
